_meta.description: MetricMind governed metric catalog. The NL→SQL agent is ONLY allowed to query metrics defined here. Any question referencing unlisted metrics must be rejected.

certified_metrics.name: daily_active_users
certified_metrics.description: Count of distinct users with at least one governed activity event (page_view, feature_used, api_call, export) on a given day.
example_questions: What was DAU last week?
Show me daily active users for the US in November
How has DAU trended over the past 30 days for Pro users?
certified_metrics.sql_template: SELECT metric_date, plan, country, acquisition_channel, daily_active_users FROM marts.mart_user_metrics WHERE {filters} ORDER BY metric_date DESC

certified_metrics.name: monthly_active_users
certified_metrics.description: Count of distinct users with at least one governed activity event in a calendar month.
example_questions: What was MAU last month?
Show monthly active users by country for Q3
Compare MAU between Pro and Starter plans
certified_metrics.sql_template: SELECT event_month, plan, country, SUM(daily_active_users) as monthly_active_users FROM marts.mart_user_metrics WHERE {filters} GROUP BY 1,2,3 ORDER BY event_month DESC

certified_metrics.name: thirty_day_retention_rate
certified_metrics.description: Percentage of a signup cohort who were active again between days 28–35 after signup. Denominator is total cohort signups.
example_questions: What's 30-day retention for the Jan 2023 cohort?
Show retention rate for EU users on Pro plan
How does retention differ between paid search and organic channels?
What's 30-day retention for the EU cohort, adjusted for refunds?
certified_metrics.sql_template: SELECT cohort_month, plan, country, acquisition_channel, signups, day30_retained, day30_retention_rate_pct FROM marts.mart_funnel_analysis WHERE {filters} ORDER BY cohort_month DESC
certified_metrics.notes: The 'adjusted for refunds' phrasing means: exclude users whose only conversion was later refunded. Use the day30_retained column which is based on activity events, not payment status — so refunds don't affect retention by definition.

certified_metrics.name: monthly_recurring_revenue
certified_metrics.description: Sum of monthly_recurring_revenue USD from active subscriptions. Negative MRR rows excluded. For annualised figure multiply by 12.
example_questions: What was MRR last month?
Show MRR trend for Enterprise plan
What's MRR by country for Q4?
How does MRR compare between monthly and annual billing?
certified_metrics.sql_template: SELECT metric_month, plan, country, acquisition_channel, mrr, arr, paying_customers FROM marts.mart_revenue_metrics WHERE {filters} ORDER BY metric_month DESC

certified_metrics.name: customer_lifetime_value
certified_metrics.description: Estimated LTV = ARPU / monthly_churn_rate × 0.70 (gross margin). Model-based estimate. See DECISIONS.md ADR-007 for methodology.
example_questions: What's the estimated LTV for Pro plan users?
Show LTV by acquisition channel
What's the LTV:CAC ratio for each plan?
certified_metrics.sql_template: SELECT metric_month, plan, country, acquisition_channel, estimated_ltv, estimated_cac, ltv_to_cac_ratio FROM marts.mart_revenue_metrics WHERE {filters} ORDER BY metric_month DESC

certified_metrics.name: churn_rate
certified_metrics.description: Percentage of paying customers who cancelled in a given month. Does not count plan downgrades.
example_questions: What was churn rate last quarter?
Show monthly churn by plan
Which country has the highest churn rate?
certified_metrics.sql_template: SELECT metric_month, plan, country, churn_rate_pct, churned_customers, paying_customers FROM marts.mart_revenue_metrics WHERE {filters} ORDER BY metric_month DESC

forbidden_operations: Direct queries to staging or raw tables
Queries referencing columns not in source_table of the metric
JOINs to tables outside the marts schema
Subqueries that bypass the mart models
Any metric not listed in certified_metrics
rejection_message: I can only answer questions about these certified metrics: daily_active_users, monthly_active_users, thirty_day_retention_rate, monthly_recurring_revenue, customer_lifetime_value, churn_rate. Your question references data or metrics outside the governed layer.
